temporal_description:
A wide shot captures a tense scene on a city street, likely at a crime scene. In the foreground, two police officers in light blue uniforms stand guard, their arms crossed, behind a blue and white police tape that cordons off the area. In the background, a larger group of police officers and other individuals are gathered, observing the scene. A white ambulance with its lights off is parked on the right, and a red car is positioned in the middle of the frame. The setting appears to be an urban environment with modern buildings and an overpass visible in the distance. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The camera is static, providing a stable view of the official investigation. The audio consists solely of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played on a string instrument, creates a serious and contemplative atmosphere. The music is slow-paced and carries a sense of sadness and gravity, fitting for a scene of investigation or aftermath. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects present.

The camera cuts to a close-up, slightly shaky shot of two men in suits. The man on the left, in a light blue suit jacket, looks intently at the man on the right. The man on the right, wearing a dark suit and tie, has a somber and focused expression as he looks down and to the side. The background is a soft-focus, indistinct urban environment. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left corner. The camera pans slightly to the right, following the man in the dark suit as he continues to look down with a serious expression. Another man in a suit is visible in the blurred background. The shot maintains its close-up framing, emphasizing the men's solemn demeanor. The "风行网" watermark is still visible.
